'''haguyu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zelatrice|zelatrice]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-g-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zelatrice|zelatrice]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| haguyu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hægiyith|hægiyith]] || [[word:hægiyij|hægiyij]] || [[word:hægiyish|hægiyish]] || [[word:hægiyi|hægiyi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:haguguyuth|haguguyuth]] || [[word:haguguyuj|haguguyuj]] || [[word:haguguyush|haguguyush]] || [[word:haguguyu|haguguyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:haguyuth|haguyuth]] || [[word:haguyuj|haguyuj]] || [[word:haguyush|haguyush]] || [[word:haguyu|haguyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hagufyuth|hagufyuth]] || [[word:hagufyuj|hagufyuj]] || [[word:hagufyush|hagufyush]] || [[word:hagufyuf|hagufyuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:haguyuthu|haguyuthu]] || [[word:haguyuju|haguyuju]] || [[word:haguyushu|haguyushu]] || [[word:haguyuku|haguyuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:haguyuth|haguyuth]] || [[word:haguyuj|haguyuj]] || [[word:haguyush|haguyush]] || [[word:haguyu|haguyu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:haguyuthul|haguyuthul]] || [[word:haguyujul|haguyujul]] || [[word:haguyushul|haguyushul]] || [[word:haguyukul|haguyukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:haguyuthuthu|haguyuthuthu]] || [[word:haguyujuju|haguyujuju]] || [[word:haguyushushu|haguyushushu]] || [[word:haguyuku|haguyuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:haguyuthun|haguyuthun]] || [[word:haguyujun|haguyujun]] || [[word:haguyushun|haguyushun]] || [[word:haguyukun|haguyukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:haguyuthuoro|haguyuthuoro]] || [[word:haguyujuoro|haguyujuoro]] || [[word:haguyushuoro|haguyushuoro]] || [[word:haguyukuoro|haguyukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a249b1f}}
